caption: Pulled the wood-ash test tiles this morning. Three of five are exactly right — the fourth crawled badly. Showing Saito-san Friday.
Which clay body? I had crawling issues with my Shigaraki blend last month too.
Shigaraki, yeah. Think it's application thickness. Going back in Thursday if I can get a bisque slot.
Good luck — let me know what Saito-san says 🙏

Pulled a tea bowl in temmoku from firing 1. The glaze broke exactly where the ash pooled. #temmoku #kyotoceramics
